MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED., SEP-10-2008: Arnold Walter Evje, counsel for Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc, plaintiff; Andre Nelson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Alastair John MacKinnon Findeis, Esquire, limited scope attorney for defendant Mollie Ennis, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 66 Geary Street, 617, San Francisco, California. The SEP-15-2008 Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
